overview: Bold, professional single-page landing website for Bahasa Holdings Pty (Ltd) — a South African Configuration Management and industrial plant labelling company with 10+ years serving Eskom power stations. Features a dark industrial aesthetic, authentic field photography gallery, service showcase, and lead-generation contact form.
features: Hero section with field photography and dual CTAs
Who We Are intro with SVG logo and registration details
Proof of Work photo gallery with lightbox (12 images)
Why Choose stats and competitive advantage cards
Contact form with Google Maps embed
